allow: PowerShell(cmdkey /delete:"LegacyGeneric:target=GitHub - https://api.github.com/mativia"; "EXIT=$LASTEXITCODE"; "=== credenciales github restantes \(no deberia quedar ninguna\) ==="; cmdkey /list | Select-String -SimpleMatch "github")

PowerShell(cmdkey "/delete:LegacyGeneric:target=GitHub - https://api.github.com/mativia"; "EXIT=$LASTEXITCODE"; "=== credenciales github restantes ==="; $r = cmdkey /list | Select-String -SimpleMatch "github"; if \($r\) { $r } else { "ninguna \(limpio\)" })

PowerShell(cmd /c 'cmdkey /delete:"LegacyGeneric:target=GitHub - https://api.github.com/mativia"'; "EXIT=$LASTEXITCODE"; "=== restantes ==="; $r = cmdkey /list | Select-String -SimpleMatch "github"; if \($r\) { $r } else { "ninguna \(limpio\)" })
